metadata.name: Respond to HCP about Potential Drug Interaction

description: A medical information specialist receives a call from a pharmacist asking about a potential drug-drug interaction for a specific product.

nodes.task_description: Log the inquiry, capturing the two drugs in question.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a new medical inquiry case with the relevant product names.

nodes.task_description: Search the product's prescribing information (package insert) and the internal knowledge base for known interaction data.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds information in the knowledge base detailing a moderate pharmacokinetic interaction.

nodes.task_description: Verbally communicate the findings to the pharmacist in a balanced, non-promotional manner.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly explains the nature of the interaction and the recommendations listed in the product labeling.

nodes.task_description: Document the details of the conversation and the information provided in the case system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent writes a concise and accurate summary of the interaction and closes the case.
